pull_request.title: feat: add user authentication middleware
pull_request.body:
This PR introduces JWT-based authentication middleware for the web API.

## Changes
- Added `auth_middleware.py` with token validation
- Updated `app.py` to register the middleware
- Added unit tests for token parsing
- Fixed token expiry edge case

Closes #42

files.patch:
@@ -45,8 +45,24 @@
     def validate_token(self, token: str) -> bool:
-        decoded = jwt.decode(token, self.secret)
-        return decoded is not None
+        try:
+            decoded = jwt.decode(token, self.secret, algorithms=['HS256'])
+            return decoded.get('exp', 0) > time.time()
+        except jwt.ExpiredSignatureError:
+            return False
